content: Scientists at Rice University have produced the first full, dye-free molecular atlas of an Alzheimer s brain. By combining laser-based imaging with machine learning, they uncovered chemical changes that spread unevenly across the brain and extend beyond amyloid plaques. Key memory regions showed major shifts in cholesterol and energy-related molecules. The findings hint that Alzheimer s is a whole-brain metabolic disruption not just a protein problem.

metadata.summary: Scientists at Rice University have produced the first full, dye-free molecular atlas of an Alzheimer s brain
